question: Give the titles of books authored by Plato that have a sale price lower than the average sale price across all books.
sql: SELECT Title FROM Book JOIN Author_Book ON Book.ISBN = Author_Book.ISBN JOIN Author ON Author_Book.Author = Author.idAuthor WHERE Author.Name = 'Plato' AND Book.SalePrice < (SELECT AVG(SalePrice) FROM Book)

back_translation.intent: 查询特定作者的书籍中，销售价格低于该作者书籍平均销售价格的书名

semantic.reason: 原始问题中的平均价格是针对所有书籍的，而SQL描述中子查询仅计算了Plato书籍的平均价格，导致过滤条件的计算范围不一致
